title: Power Plant Emergency Power Record
description: 발전설치 비상전력 및 자가발전 운영 기록 (outage, partial failure, load shedding, grid instability events).

psm_applicable.description: 대규모 발전시설 (보일러/가스) PSM 적용 여부 (OSHA-KR Art 44)

emergency_type.description: Type of emergency power event: full outage, partial failure, deliberate load shedding, or grid instability

backup_power_source.description: Type of backup/emergency power source activated

activation_time_iso.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of emergency power system activation

restoration_time_iso.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of normal power restoration (null if not yet restored)

duration_minutes.description: Duration of emergency power operation in minutes

critical_loads_maintained.description: Whether critical safety loads were maintained during the emergency

affected_areas.description: List of facility areas affected by the emergency power event

root_cause.description: Description of the root cause of the emergency power event

corrective_action.description: Corrective action taken or planned to prevent recurrence

equipment_id.description: Reference ID of the affected equipment or asset

incident_report_ref.description: Cross-domain reference to the incident report record

legal_basis.description: Multi-source legal basis. Primary: OSHA-KR Art.44 (process safety management for power generation), 전기사업법 Art.46 (electrical facility safety obligations), SAPA Art.4 (safety assessment and accident prevention). Adjacent laws may include: 전기안전관리법 Articles 16/29 (inspection, safety manager), 발전설비 안전관리 규정 (MOTIE inspection standards).
